member.name: T:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants
member.summary: Contains constant values used throughout the Kalshi trading bot system for API interactions, WebSocket communication, and data processing. This centralizes magic strings to improve maintainability and reduce the risk of typos in hardcoded values.

member.name: T:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.MarketStatus
member.summary: Enum representing the possible statuses of a market.

member.name: T:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.TimeInterval
member.summary: Enum representing time intervals for candlestick data.

member.name: T:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.FeedType
member.summary: Enum representing WebSocket feed types.

member.name: T:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.ScriptType
member.summary: Enum representing script types for API endpoints.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Status_Finalized
member.summary: Represents a market that has been finalized and is no longer active.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Status_Active
member.summary: Represents an actively trading market where orders can be placed.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Status_Bad
member.summary: Represents a market that has been marked as bad or invalid.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Status_Open
member.summary: Represents a market that is open for trading but not yet active.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Status_Closed
member.summary: Represents a market that has been closed and is no longer accepting orders.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Status_Determined
member.summary: Represents a market where the outcome has been determined.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Status_Inactive
member.summary: Represents a market that is inactive and not available for trading.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Status_Initialized
member.summary: Represents a market that has been initialized but not yet open.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Status_Settled
member.summary: Represents a market that has been settled and payouts distributed.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Status_Unopened
member.summary: Represents a market that has not yet opened for trading.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Interval_Minute
member.summary: Represents a one-minute time interval for candlestick data.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Interval_Hour
member.summary: Represents a one-hour time interval for candlestick data.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Interval_Day
member.summary: Represents a one-day time interval for candlestick data.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Parameter_Action
member.summary: Parameter name for specifying the action in API requests (e.g., buy/sell).

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Parameter_Series_Ticker
member.summary: Parameter name for specifying a series ticker in API requests.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Parameter_Market_Ticker
member.summary: Parameter name for specifying a market ticker in API requests.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Parameter_Event_Ticker
member.summary: Parameter name for specifying an event ticker in API requests.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Parameter_Interval
member.summary: Parameter name for specifying a time interval in API requests.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Parameter_Start_Ts
member.summary: Parameter name for specifying a start timestamp in API requests.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Parameter_Start_Ts_m
member.summary: Parameter name for specifying a start timestamp in minutes in API requests.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Parameter_Start_Ts_h
member.summary: Parameter name for specifying a start timestamp in hours in API requests.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Parameter_Start_Ts_d
member.summary: Parameter name for specifying a start timestamp in days in API requests.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Parameter_End_Ts
member.summary: Parameter name for specifying an end timestamp in API requests.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Parameter_Status
member.summary: Parameter name for specifying market status in API requests.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Parameter_With_Nested_Markets
member.summary: Parameter name for including nested markets in API responses.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Parameter_Max_Close_TS
member.summary: Parameter name for specifying maximum close timestamp in API requests.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Parameter_Min_Close_TS
member.summary: Parameter name for specifying minimum close timestamp in API requests.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Parameter_Tickers
member.summary: Parameter name for specifying multiple tickers in API requests.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.ScriptType_Feed_Ticker
member.summary: Feed type for ticker updates containing price and volume information.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.ScriptType_Feed_Orderbook
member.summary: Feed type for orderbook updates containing bid/ask price changes.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.ScriptType_Feed_Fill
member.summary: Feed type for fill updates containing executed trade information.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.ScriptType_Feed_Lifecycle
member.summary: Feed type for lifecycle updates containing market status changes.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.ScriptType_Feed_Trade
member.summary: Feed type for trade updates containing individual trade executions.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.ScriptType_Feed_Event_Lifecycle
member.summary: Feed type for event lifecycle updates containing event-level status changes.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Channel_Orderbook_Delta
member.summary: Channel name for orderbook delta updates (incremental changes).

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.Channel_Market_Lifecycle_V2
member.summary: Channel name for market lifecycle v2 updates.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.AllChannels
member.summary: Array of all available WebSocket feed channels for subscription. Note: These arrays are static readonly for performance, initialized once at runtime. For frequent access, consider caching if lookups are needed.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.MarketChannels
member.summary: Array of market-specific WebSocket feed channels (excluding event-level feeds). Note: These arrays are static readonly for performance, initialized once at runtime. For frequent access, consider caching if lookups are needed.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.MarketChannelsDelta
member.summary: Array of market-specific WebSocket channels for delta updates. Note: These arrays are static readonly for performance, initialized once at runtime. For frequent access, consider caching if lookups are needed.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.ScriptType_Market
member.summary: Script type identifier for market-related API endpoints.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.ScriptType_Event
member.summary: Script type identifier for event-related API endpoints.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.ScriptType_Series
member.summary: Script type identifier for series-related API endpoints.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.ScriptType_Candlestick
member.summary: Script type identifier for candlestick data API endpoints.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.ScriptType_ChartCandlesticks
member.summary: Script type identifier for chart candlestick data API endpoints.

member.name: M:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.TruncateDateTimeToMinute(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Truncates a DateTime to the nearest minute boundary, setting seconds and milliseconds to zero. This is useful for aligning timestamps for candlestick data and time-based calculations.
member.returns: A new DateTime truncated to the minute.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.EndedStatuses
member.summary: HashSet of market statuses that indicate the market has ended. Used for efficient lookup in IsMarketStatusEnded.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.EndedStatusEnums
member.summary: HashSet of market status enums that indicate the market has ended. Used for efficient lookup in IsMarketStatusEnded.

member.name: M:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.IsMarketStatusEnded(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether a market status indicates that the market has ended and is no longer active. Ended markets include those that are finalized, bad, closed, settled, determined, or inactive.
member.param: The market status string to evaluate.
member.returns: True if the market has ended, false otherwise.

member.name: M:BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.IsMarketStatusEnded(BacklashInterfaces.Constants.KalshiConstants.MarketStatus)
member.summary: Determines whether a market status indicates that the market has ended and is no longer active.
member.param: The market status enum to evaluate.
member.returns: True if the market has ended, false otherwise.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.Undefined
member.summary: Default for unmapped or undefined market conditions

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.LowLiquidity
member.summary: Market with low liquidity, difficult to trade without impacting prices

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.Bouncing
member.summary: Market with prices oscillating within a range, suitable for mean-reversion strategies

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.Trending
member.summary: Market with consistent price movement in one direction, suitable for momentum strategies

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.Volatile
member.summary: Market is experiencing significant fluctuations

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.Stagnant
member.summary: Market with minimal price movement, low activity, and stable conditions

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.HighUncertainty
member.summary: Market with high uncertainty, often in balanced or unclear outcomes

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.TrendingActive
member.summary: Trending market with high activity levels

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.VolatileEvents
member.summary: Volatile market driven by specific events

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.StableMacro
member.summary: Stable market influenced by macroeconomic factors

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.SeasonalVolatile
member.summary: Volatile market with seasonal or predictable patterns

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.NewsDriven
member.summary: Market driven by news and sentiment

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.TechTrend
member.summary: Trending market in technology or innovation sectors

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.FinancialMomentum
member.summary: Momentum-driven market in financial assets

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.ImminentCloseVolatile
member.summary: Market close to resolution with high volatility

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.FarStable
member.summary: Long-term stable market

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.MarketType.EventDriven
member.summary: Event-specific market like awards or launches

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.ActionType.None
member.summary: No action to be taken

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.ActionType.Exit
member.summary: Exit an existing position

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.ActionType.Long
member.summary: Enter a long position (buy)

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.ActionType.Short
member.summary: Enter a short position (sell)

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.ActionType.PostYes
member.summary: Limit buy yes (or equiv)

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.ActionType.PostAsk
member.summary: Limit sell yes

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.ActionType.Cancel
member.summary: Cancel resting

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.ActionType.LongPostAsk
member.summary: Market long, then immediately post a YES ask (resting sell) for what you just bought

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.ActionType.ShortPostYes
member.summary: Market short, then immediately post a YES bid (resting buy) for what you just sold

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.ComparisonOperator.GreaterThan
member.summary: Condition where value is greater than a threshold

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.ComparisonOperator.LessThan
member.summary: Condition where value is less than a threshold

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.ComparisonOperator.EqualTo
member.summary: Condition where value is equal to a threshold

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.ComparisonOperator.GreaterThanOrEqual
member.summary: Condition where value is greater than or equal to a threshold

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.ComparisonOperator.LessThanOrEqual
member.summary: Condition where value is less than or equal to a threshold

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.ComparisonOperator.Exists
member.summary: Condition where a value exists

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.ComparisonOperator.NotExists
member.summary: Condition where a value does not exist

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.Conditions_PriceMovement.Trending
member.summary: Price is consistently moving in one direction (up or down)

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.Conditions_PriceMovement.Bouncing
member.summary: Price is oscillating within a defined range without a clear trend

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.Conditions_PriceMovement.Volatile
member.summary: Price is experiencing significant fluctuations

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.Conditions_PriceMovement.Stable
member.summary: Price is relatively steady with minimal movement

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.Conditions_Liquidity.High
member.summary: Easy to trade without significantly affecting prices

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.Conditions_Liquidity.Low
member.summary: Difficult to trade without affecting prices

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.Conditions_Liquidity.Moderate
member.summary: Average liquidity, neither particularly high nor low

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.Conditions_ClosingTime.Far
member.summary: A long time remains until expiry (e.g., weeks or months)

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.Conditions_ClosingTime.Near
member.summary: Close to expiry (e.g., days or hours)

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.Conditions_ClosingTime.Imminent
member.summary: Very close to expiry (e.g., minutes or hours)

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.Conditions_ActivityLevel.High
member.summary: Lots of trading activity (e.g., high volume or frequent trades)

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.Conditions_ActivityLevel.Low
member.summary: Little trading activity (e.g., low volume or infrequent trades)

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.Conditions_ActivityLevel.Moderate
member.summary: Average trading activity, neither particularly high nor low

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.Conditions_UncertaintySignal.High
member.summary: Outcome is unclear or highly uncertain

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.StrategyEnums.Conditions_UncertaintySignal.Low
member.summary: Outcome is relatively clear or certain

member.name: T:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.SubscriptionState
member.summary: Represents the current state of a subscription to a specific market data channel via WebSocket. This enum is used by the SubscriptionManager to track and manage the lifecycle of subscriptions, ensuring proper handling of connection states and preventing duplicate or invalid operations.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.SubscriptionState.Unsubscribed
member.summary: The subscription is not active. This is the initial state before any subscription attempt, or after a successful unsubscription. In this state, no data is being received for the channel.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.SubscriptionState.Subscribing
member.summary: A subscription request has been sent to the server, but confirmation has not yet been received. This transitional state prevents multiple concurrent subscription attempts for the same channel.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.SubscriptionState.Subscribed
member.summary: The subscription is active and confirmed. Data for the channel is being received and processed. This state indicates a successful connection and ongoing data flow.

member.name: F:BacklashInterfaces.Enums.SubscriptionState.Unsubscribing
member.summary: An unsubscription request has been sent to the server, but confirmation has not yet been received. This transitional state ensures clean disconnection and prevents new subscription attempts during teardown.

member.name: T:BacklashInterfaces.SmokehouseBot.Services.IHealthCheckService
member.summary: Interface for health check services to verify dependent services are operational.

member.name: M:BacklashInterfaces.SmokehouseBot.Services.IHealthCheckService.CheckHealthAsync
member.summary: Performs health checks on dependent services.
member.returns: True if all health checks pass, false otherwise.

member.name: T:BacklashInterfaces.SmokehouseBot.Timers.ITimer
member.summary: Interface for timer functionality, allowing dependency injection of timer implementations.

member.name: E:BacklashInterfaces.SmokehouseBot.Timers.ITimer.Elapsed
member.summary: Occurs when the interval elapses.

member.name: P:BacklashInterfaces.SmokehouseBot.Timers.ITimer.Interval
member.summary: Gets or sets the interval at which to raise the Elapsed event.

member.name: P:BacklashInterfaces.SmokehouseBot.Timers.ITimer.AutoReset
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the Timer should raise the Elapsed event each time the specified interval elapses or only after the first time.

member.name: P:BacklashInterfaces.SmokehouseBot.Timers.ITimer.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the Timer should raise the Elapsed event.

member.name: M:BacklashInterfaces.SmokehouseBot.Timers.ITimer.Start
member.summary: Starts the timer.

member.name: M:BacklashInterfaces.SmokehouseBot.Timers.ITimer.Stop
member.summary: Stops the timer.

member.name: M:BacklashInterfaces.SmokehouseBot.Timers.ITimer.Change(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Changes the start time and the interval between method invocations for a timer, using 32-bit signed integers to measure time intervals.
member.param: The amount of time to delay before the invoking the callback method specified when the Timer was constructed, in milliseconds. Specify Timeout.Infinite to prevent the timer from restarting. Specify zero (0) to restart the timer immediately.
The time interval between invocations of the callback method specified when the Timer was constructed, in milliseconds. Specify Timeout.Infinite to disable periodic signaling.
